title: Fast Fiction Factory Source-Span Quality Audit
purpose: Focused local Review Hub audit that classifies source-span usefulness and routing quality across the existing 36-row source-span review pack while preserving review memory, review procedure, source-span pack, model/API boundary, local adapter artifacts, freeform review, and human-owned canon boundaries without starting model/API work.
generated_from: User review: Review Hub too vertically long, English-first, layered between story and project information, and Raw Story Memo sticky behavior feels awkward
validation_command: & { $files = @('public/review/index.html', 'tools/fff-state.mjs', 'tools/fff-extract-local.mjs', 'tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs', 'artifacts/artifact-manifest.json', 'artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md', 'artifacts/source-span-quality-audit-result.json', 'artifacts/review-memory-dedup-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/review-procedure-lock-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json', 'artifacts/source-span-routing-triage-result.json', 'docs/review/source-span-quality-audit.md', 'docs/review/review-memory-dedup.md', 'docs/review/review-procedure.md', 'docs/review/review-hub-ia-mode-split.md', 'docs/review/source-span-routing-review-pack.md', 'docs/review/current-status.md', 'docs/review/model-api-boundary-spec.md', 'docs/data-model.md', 'artifacts/model-api-boundary-envelope.example.json', 'artifacts/model-api-boundary-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/sample-project-state.json', 'artifacts/current-project-state.json', 'artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json', 'artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json', 'scripts/operator/open_review.ps1', 'scripts/operator/open_review.sh'); $missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { throw ('Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')) }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne 'fff-source-span-quality-audit-001') { throw 'Manifest artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_review_memory_dedup_artifact_id -ne 'fff-review-memory-dedup-001') { throw 'Preserved review memory artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_review_procedure_lock_artifact_id -ne 'fff-review-procedure-lock-001') { throw 'Preserved review procedure artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_review_hub_ia_mode_split_artifact_id -ne 'fff-review-hub-ia-mode-split-001') { throw 'Preserved Review Hub IA artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_source_span_artifact_id -ne 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001') { throw 'Preserved source-span artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_model_api_boundary_artifact_id -ne 'fff-model-api-boundary-spec-001') { throw 'Preserved model/API boundary artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Review input mode mismatch' }; $requiredMemoryFields = @('artifact_id', 'subject', 'current_scope', 'prior_review_count', 'latest_user_signal', 'latest_user_signal_summary', 'accepted_scope', 'not_accepted_scope', 'next_nonredundant_axis', 'repeated_review_allowed', 'review_reset_trigger'); $memory = @($manifest.review_memory); @('fff-review-procedure-lock-001', 'fff-review-hub-ia-mode-split-001', 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001', 'fff-source-span-quality-audit-001') | ForEach-Object { $artifactId = $_; $entry = $memory | Where-Object { $_.artifact_id -eq $artifactId }; if (-not $entry) { throw ('Missing review memory entry: ' + $artifactId) } }; foreach ($entry in $memory) { foreach ($field in $requiredMemoryFields) { if (-not ($entry.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $field)) { throw ('Missing review memory field ' + $field + ' for ' + $entry.artifact_id) } } }; $audit = Get-Content artifacts/source-span-quality-audit-result.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($audit.artifact_id -ne 'fff-source-span-quality-audit-001' -or $audit.schemaVersion -ne 'fff.sourceSpanQualityAudit.v1' -or -not $audit.passed) { throw 'Source-span quality audit result mismatch' }; if ($audit.summary.rows_classified -ne 36 -or $audit.summary.total_elements -ne 36 -or $audit.summary.useful_span_count -ne 28 -or $audit.summary.weak_span_count -ne 6 -or $audit.summary.overly_broad_span_count -ne 2 -or $audit.summary.missing_source_ref_count -ne 0 -or $audit.summary.ambiguous_routing_count -ne 7 -or $audit.summary.unsafe_routing_guarded_count -ne 3 -or $audit.summary.human_owned_boundary_preserved_count -ne 17) { throw 'Source-span quality audit count mismatch' }; if ($audit.review_dedup_gate_result.review_card_emitted -ne $false -or $audit.review_dedup_gate_result.repeated_general_review_request_emitted -ne $false) { throw 'Review Dedup Gate emitted repeated review' }; if ($audit.review_memory_checked.axis -ne 'source_span_quality' -or $audit.review_memory_checked.prior_review_count -ne 0) { throw 'Review memory axis/count mismatch' }; $pack = Get-Content artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $pack.passed) { throw 'Source-span review pack failed' }; if ($audit.summary.total_elements -ne $pack.cross_fixture_summary.total_elements) { throw 'Audit and pack element count mismatch' }; if ($audit.summary.missing_source_ref_count -ne $pack.cross_fixture_summary.missing_source_refs) { throw 'Audit and pack missing ref mismatch' }; if ($audit.summary.human_owned_boundary_preserved_count -ne $pack.cross_fixture_summary.human_owned_guarded_elements) { throw 'Audit and pack human-owned guard mismatch' }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @('fff-source-span-quality-audit-001', 'docs/review/source-span-quality-audit.md', 'artifacts/source-span-quality-audit-result.json', 'source-span quality audit classified', 'fff-review-memory-dedup-001', 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001', 'fff-model-api-boundary-spec-001', 'externalCallAllowed: false', 'data-review-mode="story"', 'data-mode-target="source"', 'data-mode-panel="source"') | ForEach-Object { if (-not $html.Contains($_)) { throw ('Missing required Review Hub text: ' + $_) } }; if ($html -match 'position:\s*sticky') { throw 'Unexpected sticky positioning remains' }; $doc = Get-Content docs/review/source-span-quality-audit.md -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @('Review Memory Readback', 'Audit Result', 'Weak Span Examples', 'Broad Span Examples', 'Routing Quality', 'Human-Owned Boundaries', 'Validation Contract') | ForEach-Object { if (-not $doc.Contains($_)) { throw ('Missing source-span quality audit doc section: ' + $_) } }; node tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json; Get-ChildItem artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs -Filter *.json | ForEach-Object { node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw ('Adapter output validation failed: ' + $_.Name) } }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures; $pack = Get-Content artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $pack.passed) { throw 'Source-span review pack failed after regeneration' }; if ($pack.cross_fixture_summary.fixture_count -ne 3 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.total_elements -ne 36 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.source_span_mismatches -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.missing_source_refs -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.unsafe_visual_routing -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.non_held_review_defaults -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.human_owned_decision_adopt_suggestions -ne 0) { throw 'Source-span review pack guard mismatch' }; Write-Output 'Source-span quality audit validation passed' }
